description: Log in to Moodle (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) and navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course. Create a Lesson activity named "Cell Biology Interactive Lesson" with the description "An interactive lesson covering fundamental cell biology concepts including cell structure and organelles." The lesson must include a content page titled "Introduction to Cells" with educational text and a continue button, a multiple-choice question page titled "Cell Organelle Question" asking "Which organelle is responsible for producing energy in the cell?" (Correct: Mitochondria; Incorrect: Nucleus, Ribosome, Cell membrane), and a final content page titled "Summary and Next Steps" that ends the lesson. Ensure the pages are linked sequentially and the question is configured for correct grading.
